mapper.select:
SELECT A.NOTICE_ID , A.TITLE , A.CONTENTS , A.DELETE_YN , A.POST_STRT_DT , A.POST_END_DT , A.REGST_ID , TO_CHAR(A.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGST_DTTM , A.RVISN_ID , TO_CHAR(A.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') RVISN_DTTM , B.TYPE_CD , A.ORGN , A.ORGN10 , A.ORGN20 , A.ORGN40 , A.REGST_ORGN_NM , A.REGST_USR_NM , DECODE( ( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = A.NOTICE_ID AND ATT_SCTN = 'NTC') ), 0, 0, 1) FILE_YN FROM CMN_NOTICE_MST A , (SELECT TYPE_CD FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = #{SESSION_USER_ORGN_ID} AND ROWNUM = 1) B WHERE 1=1 AND A.POST_STRT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.POST_END_DT >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.DELETE_YN = 'N'
AND A.ORGN40 = '1'
AND A.ORGN20 = '1'
AND UPPER(A.TITLE) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{TITLE}) || '%'
AND UPPER(A.REGST_USR_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{REGST_USR_NM}) || '%'
AND UPPER(A.REGST_ORGN_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{REGST_ORGN_NM} )|| '%'
AND A.POST_STRT_DT >= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{SRCH_STRT_DT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD')
AND A.POST_STRT_DT <= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{SRCH_END_DT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD')
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(A.NOTICE_ID) DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CMN_NOTICE_MST ( NOTICE_ID ,TITLE ,CONTENTS ,DELETE_YN ,POST_STRT_DT ,POST_END_DT ,REGST_ID ,REGST_DTTM ,ORGN ,ORGN10 ,ORGN20 ,ORGN40 ,REGST_ORGN_NM ,REGST_USR_NM ) VALUES ( #{NOTICE_ID} ,#{TITLE} ,#{CONTENTS} ,NVL( #{DELETE_YN}, 'N') ,#{POST_STRT_DT} ,#{POST_END_DT} ,#{SESSION_USER_ID } ,SYSDATE ,NVL( #{ORGN}, 0) ,NVL( #{ORGN10}, 0) ,NVL( #{ORGN20}, 0) ,NVL( #{ORGN40}, 0) ,( SELECT A.ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST A ,CMN_USR_MST B WHERE 1=1 AND A.ORGN_ID = B.ORGN_ID AND B.USR_ID = #{SESSION_USER_ID} ) ,(SELECT USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = #{SESSION_USER_ID}) )
mapper.update: UPDATE CMN_NOTICE_MST SET DELETE_YN = 'Y' WHERE NOTICE_ID = #{NOTICE_ID}
mapper.select: SELECT /* cmn.board.mapper.getFile */ ATT_ROUT /* 파일경로 */ , FILE_NM /* 파일명 */ , FILE_ID /* 파일ID */ FROM ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = #{NOTICE_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY REG_DTTM

SELECT /* cmn.board.mapper.getFile */ ATT_ROUT /* 파일경로 */ , FILE_NM /* 파일명 */ , FILE_ID /* 파일ID */ FROM ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST OFMM , CMN_NOTICE_MST CNM WHERE CNM.NOTICE_ID = OFMM.ORGN_ID AND OFMM.ATT_SCTN = 'NTC' AND CNM.DELETE_YN = 'N' AND SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(CNM.POST_STRT_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(CNM.POST_END_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AND OFMM.ORGN_ID = #{NOTICE_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY OFMM.REG_DTTM

SELECT /* cmn.board.mapper.getBoardFile */ ATT_ROUT /* 파일경로 */ , FILE_NM /* 파일명 */ , FILE_ID /* 파일ID */ FROM ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST OFMM , CMN_BOARD CB WHERE CB.SRL_NUM = OFMM.ORGN_ID AND OFMM.ATT_SCTN = 'NTC' AND CB.BOARD_CD = 'B10' AND CB.DEL_YN = 'N' AND SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(CB.POST_STRT_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(CB.POST_END_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AND OFMM.ORGN_ID = #{NOTICE_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY OFMM.REG_DTTM

/* boardMapper.getUserAuth */ SELECT CASE WHEN A.USER_AUTH = 'N' THEN (SELECT DECODE(ORGN_ID , #{orgnId} , 'Y' , 'N') FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = #{sessionUserId}) WHEN A.USER_AUTH = 'Y' THEN 'Y' END AS USER_AUTH FROM (SELECT ( CASE WHEN INSTR(CD_DSC, #{sessionUserId}) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ) AS USER_AUTH FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0057' AND CD_VAL = #{boardCd} ) A

/* boardMapper.getBoardList */
SELECT A.BOARD_CD , A.SRL_NUM , A.TITLE , A.CNTT , A.POST_STRT_DT , A.POST_END_DT , A.ORGN_TP_CD1 , A.ORGN_TP_CD2 , A.ORGN_TP_CD3 , A.ORGN_TP_CD4 , A.ORGN_TP_CD5 , FN_GET_USRNM(A.REGST_ID) AS REGST_NM , TO_CHAR(A.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') REGST_DTTM , FN_GET_USRNM(A.RVISN_ID) AS RVISN_NM , TO_CHAR(A.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') RVISN_DTTM , DECODE( ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = TO_CHAR(A.SRL_NUM) AND ATT_SCTN = 'NTC' ), 0, 0, 1 ) AS FILE_YN , A.REGST_ID as REG_ID ,(SELECT ORGN_ID FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = A.REGST_ID) AS REG_ORGN_ID FROM CMN_BOARD A WHERE A.BOARD_CD = #{boardCd} AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND #{stdrDt} BETWEEN A.POST_STRT_DT AND A.POST_END_DT
AND ( A.ORGN_TP_CD1 = '1' OR CASE WHEN #{sessionUserOrgnTypeCd} = '10' THEN DECODE( #{sessionUserOrgnId}, 'A30040999', A.ORGN_TP_CD3, A.ORGN_TP_CD2 ) WHEN #{sessionUserOrgnTypeCd} = '20' THEN ( SELECT DECODE(TYPE_CD, 'SU', A.ORGN_TP_CD5, A.ORGN_TP_CD4) FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = #{sessionUserOrgnId} ) ELSE '0' END = '1' )
AND ( A.ORGN_TP_CD1 = '1' OR CASE WHEN #{sessionUserOrgnId} = 'A30040999' THEN A.ORGN_TP_CD3 ELSE '1' END = '1' )
AND UPPER(A.TITLE) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%'
AND UPPER(A.CNTT) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%'
AND ( UPPER(A.TITLE) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%' OR UPPER(A.CNTT) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%' )
ORDER BY A.POST_STRT_DT DESC, A.SRL_NUM DESC

/* PayInfoMapper.getFileExtList */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM CMN_GRP_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE 1=1 AND A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.GRP_ID = 'CMN0232' AND B.CD_VAL = UPPER(#{ext, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
/* boardMapper.getRegOrg */ SELECT DECODE(ORGN_ID , #{orgnId} , 'Y' , 'N') as vocYn FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = #{regId}
/* boardMapper.getUpdateAuth */ SELECT DECODE(ORGN_ID , #{orgnId} , 'Y' , 'N') as UpdateAuth FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = #{sessionUserId}
